name: enhance-collections-pipeline
description: buildEnhanceCollections() is the composition pipeline: takes optional userEnhance + enablePersistence flag, returns enhancement function. Auto-composes CollectionPersistable before user enhancements. Used by domain() and loadSchema().
relevantCode: export function buildEnhanceCollections(userEnhance?, enablePersistence = true): ((cols) => cols) | undefined
recommendation: Extend with enableQueryable option (default: true). CollectionQueryable composed after CollectionPersistable, before user enhancements
